strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple domains
Proven ability to lead and ship complex systems, including open-source GIS platforms and AI-agent tooling
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills with Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK, and CI/CD practices
concerns: Title inflation in resume (e.g., Staff Software Engineer at 2025-present, currently in 2024) raises credibility questions
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or REST API design — key required skills are implied but not confirmed
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates deep fullstack expertise with TypeScript, React, and modern infrastructure, alongside strong architectural and open-source contributions, but concerns around resume credibility and limited German proficiency may hinder on-site collaboration and trust in role alignment.
